PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?branch_label ?country_label ?opening_date WHERE {
  ?branch wdt:P1815 wd:Q1045842 .
  ?branch wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?branch wdt:P571 ?opening_date .
  ?branch rdfs:label ?branch_label .
  ?country rdfs:label ?country_label .
  FILTER(LANG(?branch_label) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?country_label) = "en")
  FILTER(?country != wd:Q30)
}
